side_effects.description: Welts and itching after injection, gradually worsening over time. After ~6 weeks developed severe reaction: stomach turned bright red during injection, then head rush, lightheadedness, and full-body flushing.
Full body flushing during severe allergic reaction episode.
Head rush and lightheadedness during severe reaction.

protocol_notes: Started June 1. Reaction treated with Benadryl. Reduced dose to 1mg and missing doses intentionally out of caution after severe reaction. Has 3 more 10mg vials remaining. Suspects antibody development to Tesamorelin. Keeping Benadryl on hand.
